rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HOLBROOK EDWIN KIDD KOHRT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/12/19. (No earlier date available.) The statutory fee base may NOT include refunds (or reimbursements) for amounts paid out of the estate, including amounts paid to Stroz Friedberg that were reimbursed (one-half) by Stanford, or fee rebates if fees were charged and paid by the estate to UBS, or "miscellaneous additonal income," for which the amdinistrator cannot attribute a source. No courtesy copy of the supplement filed on 8/28/19 has been received yet by the Examiner; it was presumably superseded by the amendment filed on 9/13/19. (The amended second accounting has not yet been reviewed in full.) Courtesy copies of the second amendment (and any other papers filed hereafter) must be received by the Examiner by no later than 11/5/19. Pleadings should stand on their own and not refer to Examiner's Notes.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JIMMY LOUIE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/29/19. No courtesy copies. No proposed order. No proof of service of notice. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.6 A., and 14.93 G.] All of the above must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 10/22/19, or an appearance will be required for them to be hand-delivered to the Court. The Final I&A filed on 7/25/19 appears to be rife with errors: incomplete caption; not properly verified by the executor; statement about the bond not properly signed by the attorney; incorrect date of death. A Probate Referee was appointed on 1/2/18.
